reviews.review_msg: Very nice and approachable prof. Class is very relevant and final project is a good thing to have in interviews. Be prepared to write tonnes!

He is nice and teaches well. Exams are fair. Only thing is you will get a LOT of homework, every week actually. Be prepared to put in the time and don't take too many other classes. Also, he often isn't clear about what he expects for the HW.
Great prof, brings a lot of real world perspective into a class that could easily be very boring otherwise. Examples are good but should only be looked at as samples.

Disorganised,he gives us a very scammy course and call it  software engineering.
He keeps talking about his past experience and ramble all over the place.
Avoid If you wanna do a decent project that you can put on your resume.

Attendance was not mandatory causing people to skip her lectures and then conclude that she is a bad professor. In actuality lectures were amazing and very educational. If these people rating 1 star had been in more than 2 lectures they would see that Janice is a very competent lecturer. Lectures? Captivating. Voice? Alluring. Appearance? Gorgeous.
